column1: # Phase 6 — `{?}` pauses the macro until the user presses Enter.
#   A1: '{?}{GOTO}D5~hi~       (pause, then stamp "hi" in D5 and stop)
# Fire the macro. It hits {?} immediately and parks. Pointer
# hasn't moved; we're back in READY because no further actions
# User presses Enter to resume the pause. The macro then runs
# `{GOTO}D5~hi~` and lands a 'hi label at D5.
